layout.playLocalFolderHint: Large folders may be heavy on weak CPUs/RAM.
layout.playLocalFolderWarning: Opening a large local folder can use a lot of CPU and RAM while scanning files and reading metadata. On weak devices, choose a smaller folder or disable heavy Audio Studio effects if playback crackles. Continue?
layout.backupConfigDesc: This will overwrite your existing backup on Google Drive with your current local settings. Do you want to continue?
layout.restoreConfigDesc: This will overwrite your current local settings with the backup from Google Drive. Do you want to continue?
layout.backupFail: Failed to backup to Google Drive. Ensure you have linked your account.
layout.restoreSuccess: Restore successful! The app will now reload to apply changes.
layout.restoreFail: Failed to restore from Google Drive. No backup found or account not linked.

studio.warningDesc: Heavy effects can overload weak CPUs and make playback stutter or crackle.
studio.warningRecommendWeak: Recommended for low-powered devices: Enable pre-calculation. (Note: The more effects you enable, the longer the calculation will take).

masterOutput.title: Master Output
masterOutput.desc: Final stage output controls and panning.
masterOutput.loudnessDesc: Measures each track and applies fixed LUFS gain with peak-safe headroom. Best quality when pre-calculation is enabled.
masterOutput.hqOversampleDesc: Uses a 4x FIR oversampled soft clipper to reduce limiter aliasing. May be heavy on weak phones.
masterOutput.precalcIdleDesc: For weak CPUs with enough RAM: renders each track before playback so heavy effects do not have to run in real time. This normal mode handles one track at a time, not the whole queue. EQ/Effects changes apply on the next track.
masterOutput.fullQueueCacheDesc: Keep precalculated audio buffers for the entire queue in RAM and unlock full-queue pre-calculation. Allows instant playback of any rendered track, but consumes significantly more memory.
masterOutput.enableFullQueueFirst: Enable Full Queue RAM Cache First
masterOutput.queuePrecalcDesc: Detected {{cores}} CPU cores. Recommended: {{workers}} workers. Max: {{maxWorkers}} workers.
masterOutput.queuePrecalcDescSingleWorker: Detected {{cores}} CPU cores. This device is limited to 1 safe worker to avoid browser lag.

eq.title: Equalizer
eq.noteDesc: Switch to Advanced (10-Band) or Custom tab to freely adjust frequency sliders.
eq.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete preset '{name}'?

tone.title: Preamp & Tone
tone.desc: Global gain adjustments and bass/treble tuning.

dynamics.title: Compressor / Night Mode
dynamics.desc: Controls dynamic range separately from loudness normalization.
dynamics.limiterDesc: Catches final output peaks after soft clipping, reducing crackling when EQ, preamp, or effects raise the level. Recommended to leave on.

spatial.reverbDesc: Add space and depth using Convolution Reverb.
spatial.stereoDesc: Widen your stereo image using Mid/Side processing. 100% is normal, up to 400% is extra wide.

playlist.libraryEmpty: Your library of playlists is empty.
playlist.clickSearch: Click the button to search your library and add tracks.
playlist.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this playlist?

nowPlaying.noTrackDesc: Go to Playlist or Library to play a track
nowPlaying.cycleQueues: When the last queue ends, switch to the first queue and vice versa
